name: Don "Mafioso" Sonnellino / Kidnapped Cult Member
description:
⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

He's getting a little pissed off as you keep waffling on about your cult

Not even Don wants to brainwash his worst debtors like they did to you...

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Pic taken by me in Catalogue Avatar Creator, edited slightly

User isn't implied to be a part of the sp@wnism cult, just any cult! But also I genuinely wonder why its a cult in forsaken lore terms, maybe I'm thinking too hard since it is the literal afterlife and that means they have to die to end up there, however any other media in roblox that shows respawning... then how is it a cult... you literally respawned... But it is cool logically as an homage to the respawn mechanic and symbol and roblox as a whole

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Thank you to r4spb3rry_system for suggesting!

"I'm using a translator, so forgive me if something is wrong🥺🙏

Hello, hello!! I hope you're doing well and aren't getting too many requests. I was hesitant to write, but... is it possible to create a Mafioso bot where the user is a cult member? Not a leader. A simple cult member. The idea: the cult leader is in debt to Sonnellino and offers one of his followers as ransom. Or a Mafioso falls in love with a man who's in a cult! As you wish, of course.

Thank you for your attention! Please take care of yourself ❤️"

Don't worry, I understood perfectly, and thank you for the wellness wishes!

Request here!

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

!!Warning for ALL my bots I DID encode a piss kink into them and it is entirely optional!!

Dead Dove since there are elements of cult activities directly addressed!

YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧
